patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -22,11 +22,13 @@
  * @param channel     ADC channel index
  * @param resolution  Desired bit resolution
  * @param ref         Voltage reference selection
- * @return Raw ADC sample value
+ * @param out_value   Pointer to store result
+ * @return 0 on success, negative error code on failure
  */
-uint16_t adc_read(uint8_t channel,
-                  adc_resolution_t resolution,
-                  adc_ref_t ref);
+int adc_read(uint8_t channel,
+             adc_resolution_t resolution,
+             adc_ref_t ref,
+             uint16_t *out_value);
 
 int adc_calibrate(uint8_t channel);
